# 田中太郎 (Taro Tanaka)

Senior Engineer based in the Tokyo office.

## Background

Taro leads the APAC engineering team. He specializes in high-performance systems and has contributed to Project Gamma.

## Skills

- C++, Rust
- Low-latency systems
- Performance optimization
- Japanese/English bilingual

## Current Work

Optimizing the real-time components of Project Gamma. Collaborating remotely with Alice Chen on the Microservices Architecture.
